overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy game showing a robed character ascending stairs and walking through Gothic castle interiors with stone corridors and hanging lanterns, then exiting through massive wooden doors into a snowy outdoor courtyard with ancient ruins and towering trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, enclosed interiors of a Gothic castle into a cold, expansive snowy courtyard at twilight. It begins as the character ascends a wide wooden staircase flanked by stone railings, moving directly into a grand hall illuminated by hanging lanterns and a large fireplace. The scene then shifts into narrow corridors with vaulted ceilings, passing a suit of armor and framed portraits before approaching massive carved wooden doors. As the doors open, the warm interior light gives way to a cool blue exterior, revealing a wide courtyard filled with ancient trees and stone ruins. The camera finally explores this frozen landscape, where the glow of braziers contrasts with the distant silhouette of a stone aqueduct under the twilight sky.
